feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Version management in SAP ERP
entry.content:
Hello,

We're undergoing a landscape upgrade to SAP NW 7.5 EHP 8
As part of the upgrade process, the test environment was copied over to the dev environment via system copy. Thus, all the version management data was overwritten.

My question is this - I know that a part of the version management data is stored in table VRS_DISP and VRSD. Do You have any idea on a way to restore this data from a backup. Either a table transport or another method?

entry.title: se319 - when deleting SES
entry.content:
Dear All,

Service PO created with one PO line item and 10 service line items (without service No.)

For Service line item 6 and 7 , Service entry sheet created and GRN also posted in the background.

In the SES display, it is showing all the 9 line items with zero quantity except 6 and 7.

After GR user has manually revoked the Acceptance indicator.

Now client want to delete the service entry sheet but it is showing error as"Please enter the quantity SE319".

If i enter quantity then following error displays "SE363 Quantity exceeds the quantity in purchase order"

Please suggest how to delete the service entry sheet.

entry.title: Tax condition type is determined in the sales order but not determined in the invoice
entry.content: We have created a new tax condition type for Argentina in V/06 and maintained the relevant condition records in VK11. Issue is, sometimes, the tax condition type is getting determined in the sales order but when the invoice is created by background job (program: SDBILLDL), the same condition type is not getting determined in the invoice. When i check the pricing analysis, it shows "Condition record exists, but has not been set". It is not a manual condition, hence it cannot be deleted from the document. Also the tax condition record has already been created two months before itself. I tried replicating the issue in lower environments but i can see that the tax condition type is getting determined successfully for the same invoice data. Can you please let me know what could be the reason the tax condition is not getting determined sometimes in the invoice alone?

entry.title: Usage of IDoc in stock transfer order
entry.content:
Hello,

I hope you find my description not too long and clear enough but it is crucial to understand the business relation between the parties.

I have already searched posts related to the usage of IDoc in stock transfer order.

However, our business scenario crosses our company boundaries and is merged with the one managed by our customer.

I am looking for a solution based on IDoc exchange allowing to maintain in parallel two mirror stock transfer orders in both systems, i.e. our customer's and our own.

We are co-manufacturing end products for our customers.

This means that as soon as the production is finished (production plan received from our customer) we keep the inventory of finished product but we issue the invoice (period invoicing).

Later on, our customer asks us to move his inventory sitting at our premises from our original manufacturing plant to another of our plants.

Both all of our plants and customer's inventory in there are represented in his wn SAP system.

Therefore, he uses stock transfer orders in his own SAP to move the inventory closer to his customers he plans to deliver.

Currently, we use IDoc to manage a "classic" sales process on our side: sales order from inbound IDoc, our order acknowledgment via outbound IDoc, our outbound delivery via outbound IDoc.

We also create and process a "technical" internal purchase order in order to carry out goods receipt at our receiving plant and also to issue proof of reception to our customer.

Sales order is free of charge as we have already invoiced the end of production.

This way of handling cross system process is a little complicated for us as our customer creates  outbound delivery to move his inventory before we create our outbound delivery to execute his order.

This time difference might result quite often in stock discrepancy between our customer and us (we send inventory levels and stock movements quite often but in asynchronous mode).

Such discrepancies result in cumbersome corrections for both parties (customer and us) in their systems.

On the occasion of legacy middleware change decided by our customer, we would also like to change the integration model of such stock transfer ordered by our customer.

Ideally, we would also like to simply manage a stock transfer order rather than both free of charge sales order in our delivering plant and purchase order in the receiving one.

Which IDocs shall we use (as such or to be adjusted and, if so, and to what extent) to be able to keep synchronized our respective stock transfer orders?

Thanks for your attention and possible advice.

Andrew

entry.title: TRM Mirror transaction does not get updated after change the Intercompany transaction
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have created new Intercompany transaction deal in the TRM SAP system, we able to create the mirror transaction after executing the intercompany borrowing deal, but when we make changes in the Intercompany Transaction like Interest rate change that is not replicate in mirror transaction Automatically. Please advise the solution from your side.

Regards

Mahadev More

entry.title: FBRA Error: 'Document XXXXXXXXX is not purely a clearing document,
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to request your assistance with SAP. Could you guide me on how to reverse a clearing document that includes an allocation as a partial payment to a customer account?

Document details for reference:

Encountering error in both reversal tcodes:

Thank you.

entry.title: Hourly based Schedule line(Purchase,ME38) via Classic MRP
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We have a requirement where the supplier stays near to the  Plant may be a 40 mins and supplier agrees to supply the material on hourly basis as the distance is short .

Can MRP creates a Schedule line hourly basis and can be transmitted to supplier prior  if yes then what would be the settings.

I tried to set the JIT setup in material ,creation profile ,MRP type PD,Lot size-EX with that am able to get the schedule line but no time stamp in ME38 that can be shared to supplier after referring Note  - 2076664 am confused whether this can be used  via MRP or not .

is there no solution via classic MRP MD01 to get the schedule line hourly basis and to send the supplier on hourly basis.

MAN Production Planning (PP) Sourcing and Procurement - Purchase Contract Management MAN Material Requirements Planning @Caetano @SAPSupport @mrp,@ANKIT_CHAUHAN

entry.title: SAP ECC to S/4 Hana conversion
entry.content:
During the ERP to S/4 PERSON_NAME conversion, unable to do the readiness check. What notes to be implement to do readiness check


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Retrieving "Specifications" Text from T-CODE QE03
entry.content:
Dear all,

Is it possible to retrieve the text displayed in the "Specifications" field in T-CODE QE03? If yes, what tables or function modules can be used to fetch this information?

I need to extract specification texts similar to what is shown in QE03 and display them on an ALV. For example, if the inspection characteristic is "Package Humidity," the specification would be "<= 4.5%." Another example would be the characteristic "Feel of package" with a specification like "Feel of package [that package unit]."

Currently, I am unable to find the complete specification text directly and seem to be manually processing and assigning the correct symbols to the text. Is there a more automated way to handle this?

entry.title: What causes material to be stuck in 921?
entry.content:
We have a lot of inventory movement between 0002 and 0003 locations. By end of business day, It is nothing to have 5 to 10 materials numbers "stuck" in 921 even after transfers have been confirmed. The way our pick process is designed, negative balances in 921 generally occur when a pick has not been 100% confirmed. I understand 921 is a transitional location, creating both a negative balance in 921 and a positive balance in 0003. What would cause the negative balance to remain after the transfer has been confirmed?

Also, what causes positive balance to remain in 921 after a transfer is confirmed? 99% of the time, the original SUs are no longer in a 0002 location, but are physically in floor stock (0003). 

It is time consuming to check these each and every day, but its part of the job. If i had a better understanding of what would cause these balance to get "stuck" I might be able to devise ways to prevent or reduce these. I can also clarify more if needed.

entry.title: Extractor checker RSA2 - Error : CI_KALKTAB no active nametab
entry.content:
Hello,
When I test my data source for material calculations in RSA2, I receive the error: "No active Nametab for CI_KALKTAB present... Reactivate the ABAP/4 Dictionary object." In the extract structure, the structure is also empty (see screenshot).Can someone possibly help me here?

would be great if anyone has an idee what i can do.

 

Thanks a lot

Alex

entry.title: Programmatically Change/Update the Local SAP GUI Options
entry.content:
To all the Guru's,

When trying to set-up new users in SAP, there are things that can be done with Scripting and things that I have yet to figure out how to do.  I'm not ABAP programmer, I can barely create a script to update / data using Excel.  But using Power Points and scripting does nothing to ease the user into setting up their profile within SAP,  As a matter of course, I see that most users fail miserably in getting the User Profile set-up properly and so they struggle with using SAP.

\Having said all that, my question to all is this;

Is there a a way to programmatically change the SAP GUI Options?

I would like to send a user an email with a link or a file that would make all of the changes in their profile for them and to also change things in the SAP GUI Options (Customize Local Layout).

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Inquiry About CQC Availability for ERP ISU System Expansion
entry.content:
Hi!

I would like to know if there's a CQC service available for an ERP IS-U productive system that is about to incorporate a new functionality, which will result in an increase of approximately 250,000 clients and 1,200,000 contract accounts.

The main objective would be to ensure system performance and stability, as well as to prevent potential errors, given the scale of the change.

Thanks!

entry.title: PGI and PGR Automation for the completed Sales orders & Delivery orders
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I’m working on a business scenario and would appreciate any insights or experiences from the community. Here’s the process flow we are trying to achieve with complete automation. This scenario applies only to virtual orders; the same order types are used for virtual and nonvirtual processes.

  1. Return Sales Order Creation:

   - Create a return delivery order and assign the serial number (which is picked from a customized field in the sales order).

   - Post Goods Receipt (PGR) after assigning the serial number.

  1. Stock Allocation:

   - Upon PGR (From step 1), allocate the returned stock to the virtual sales order automatically.

  1. Order Completion and Delivery:

   - Virtual sales order is complete, and a delivery order will automatically be created.

   - Assign the serial number again and post goods issue (PGI) automatically.

Has anyone encountered a similar scenario? If so, how did you implement it? Looking forward to any suggestions or solutions.

entry.title: ECC to Target CFIN S4 : Error- Balancing field "Profit Center" in line item 001 not filled
entry.content:
Dear Members,

I am trying to validate document replication from Source ECC to Target CFIN.

With respect to this validation, I have posted SD and MM documents in ECC replicate to CFIN S4.
Document creation flow as followed:
creation of sales order - VA01 > 
creation of delivery & post goods issue -VL01N >
billing invoice creation -VF01 OR VF04 > 
creation of purchase requisition - ME51N > 
creation of purchase order-ME21N > creation of goods receipt - MIGO > creation of supplier invoice - MIRO

The RV document under VF01 need to replicate to S4 with success posting's in target BKPF table , However I am facing Error: (Balancing field "Profit Center" in line item 001 not filled).

As per S4 Document splitting settings PRCTR is mandatory and in ECC RV type document VF01 we are not maintained profit center. How to work around with successful posting in S4 CFIN ?
What are the steps and pre requisites I need to follow or which I am missing please suggest.

For example : A material transfer document from one plant to another plant. MIGO_GR Doc type WE posted in ECC was not successful in CFIN S4 displaying same error.

Thanks,

entry.title: After pFAL CP is not getting created in SRM
entry.content:
i have an employee and position id in SAP ECC and when i do PFAL it says IDOC processed successfully but in SRM system the CP is not getting created and the position doesn't also show A008 holder of this EE id. 

OBJECTS: Org Unit, Position, Pernr, Position Holder, Personal Data, Address  were maintained correctly in ECC. 

Please suggest, how to get the CP push to SRM system.

entry.title: FD08 change log for approver user
entry.content: Is there a way to check which user confirmed changes to customer master record via transaction FD08? In the change history I can only see a user that has no access to FD08 so there must have been someone else who confirmed changes.

entry.title: the email delivery in the SAP system has been delayed by more than 5 hours with code 672 and 751
entry.content: In the past few days, the email delivery in the SAP system has been delayed by more than 5 hours, resulting in 500 emails still pending with message code 672 and 751. Is there any information on how to resolve this issue?

entry.title: Configuration path for T-Code OB22 not available
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

I am trying to do a configuration for T-Code OB22 but system is asking to use T-Code FINSC_LEDGER. When I am opening the T-Code FINSC_LEDGER for the configuration, data is not same what I see in T-Code OB22. 

Can someone pls confirm on this?

entry.title: Subsequent FI document not generating
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

As per SAP suggestion we have used program ZREPMIR7 to change the status of MIRO document still system failed to post the subsequent document while re post the document in MIRO
